mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (sender_id, receiver_id, content, message_type, is_read, send_time) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{isRead}, #{sendTime})
mapper.select: SELECT cm.*, u1.real_name as senderName, u2.real_name as receiverName FROM chat_messages cm LEFT JOIN users u1 ON cm.sender_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON cm.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE (cm.sender_id = #{userId1} AND cm.receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (cm.sender_id = #{userId2} AND cm.receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY cm.send_time ASC
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END as contact_id FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY contact_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
